3113590.name: MARBOLUS
3113590.description:
Introducing MARBOLUS... It's Racing with BALLS!

Marbolus is an atmospheric low-poly racing game inspired by 90s CG renders, vaporwave, and just retro graphics as a whole. Providing an aesthetic and nostalgic racing experience, even if you don't want it.

It's fun, it's addicting, it's exhilarating, and it's got BALLS!

Features:

  • Form an online lobby and play against others in a variety of game-modes, from time-trials, constant ability mayhem, or just classic racing.

  • 10 Unique tracks based on Roman and Greek Mythology with a little science fiction tossed in.

  • 10+ abilities, ranging from making you friction-less to turning off someones' gravity.

Race your way into the solar system on 10 unique tracks that combine the Roman and Greek Mythologies with natural planetary wonders. Use and abuse every element such as boosts, walls, icy patches and muddy crevices, abilities that grant speed, leave walls, spew oil, place traps, and more. Each level is designed to bring out a different style of play; from open ended stretches to straight and narrow roads, letting you outwit and outmaneuver your opponents in any way you want.

Whether your racing against other players or AI, you must be wary as each track will bring a different environmental challenge. From water slowly flooding everything, lightning striking wherever it wants, to vicious jungle plants trying to eat you. How do you handle an exploding racetrack?

Come join us in MARBOLUS!

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
